'''鈭歠-d-n''' ('''kafadan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umcast|umcast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umcast|umcast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-d-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafadan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadan|thifadan]] || [[word:jifadan|jifadan]] || [[word:shifadan|shifadan]] || [[word:kifadan|kifadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadan|thuthufadan]] || [[word:jujufadan|jujufadan]] || [[word:shushufadan|shushufadan]] || [[word:kukufadan|kukufadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufadan|thufadan]] || [[word:jufadan|jufadan]] || [[word:shufadan|shufadan]] || [[word:kufadan|kufadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufadan|thufadan]] || [[word:jufadan|jufadan]] || [[word:shufadan|shufadan]] || [[word:kufadan|kufadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefadan|thefadan]] || [[word:jefadan|jefadan]] || [[word:shefadan|shefadan]] || [[word:kefadan|kefadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofadan|thothofadan]] || [[word:jojofadan|jojofadan]] || [[word:shoshofadan|shoshofadan]] || [[word:kokofadan|kokofadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofadan|thofadan]] || [[word:jofadan|jofadan]] || [[word:shofadan|shofadan]] || [[word:kofadan|kofadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofadan|thofadan]] || [[word:jofadan|jofadan]] || [[word:shofadan|shofadan]] || [[word:kofadan|kofadan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]] || [[word:fadan|fadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fadan|th忙fadan]] || [[word:j忙fadan|j忙fadan]] || [[word:sh忙fadan|sh忙fadan]] || [[word:k忙fadan|k忙fadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafadan|thathafadan]] || [[word:jajafadan|jajafadan]] || [[word:shashafadan|shashafadan]] || [[word:kakafadan|kakafadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafadan|thafadan]] || [[word:jafadan|jafadan]] || [[word:shafadan|shafadan]] || [[word:kafadan|kafadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadan|thafadan]] || [[word:jafadan|jafadan]] || [[word:shafadan|shafadan]] || [[word:kafadan|kafadan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafadan|shafadan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafadan|goshafadan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafadan|gokishafadan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafadann眉|shafadann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafadannkn眉|goshafadannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadann眉|gokishafadann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafadansh毛|shafadansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafadannksh毛|goshafadannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafadansh毛|gokishafadansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadanro|shafadanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadannkro|goshafadannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadanro|gokishafadanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadanmu|shafadanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadannkmu|goshafadannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadanmu|gokishafadanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafadansher|shafadansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafadannksher|goshafadannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafadansher|gokishafadansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafadanng|shafadanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafadannkng|goshafadannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafadanng|gokishafadanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafadanya|shafadanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafadannkya|goshafadannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafadanya|gokishafadanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafadanyam|shafadanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafadannkyam|goshafadannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafadanyam|gokishafadanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadann眉sh毛|shafadann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadannkn眉sh毛|goshafadannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadann眉sh毛|gokishafadann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadann眉ro|shafadann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadannkn眉ro|goshafadannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadann眉ro|gokishafadann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadann眉mu|shafadann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadannkn眉mu|goshafadannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadann眉mu|gokishafadann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadansh毛n眉|shafadansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadannksh毛n眉|goshafadannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadansh毛n眉|gokishafadansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadansh毛ro|shafadansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadannksh毛ro|goshafadannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadansh毛ro|gokishafadansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadansh毛mu|shafadansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadannksh毛mu|goshafadannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadansh毛mu|gokishafadansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadanron眉|shafadanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadannkron眉|goshafadannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadanron眉|gokishafadanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadanrosh毛|shafadanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadannkrosh毛|goshafadannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadanrosh毛|gokishafadanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadanromu|shafadanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadannkromu|goshafadannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadanromu|gokishafadanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadanmun眉|shafadanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadannkmun眉|goshafadannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadanmun眉|gokishafadanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadanmush毛|shafadanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadannkmush毛|goshafadannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadanmush毛|gokishafadanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadanmuro|shafadanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadannkmuro|goshafadannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadanmuro|gokishafadanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
